title: BLIPZONES: Rebirth
mbtiTestDesc: 20 absurd situations in the Joseon Dynasty! Find your past life Yokai.
yokaiGrowthDesc: Grow 16 types of Yokai through 7 stages to ascend them into divine beasts.
minigameDesc: Earn coins and experience through archery, riddles, and Yut Nori.
analysisDesc: Complete analysis from Joseon and modern interpretations to strengths, weaknesses, and compatibility!
